steps.title: Remove the sales tax
steps.content:
A $6\%$ sales tax means the after-tax total is $1.06$ times the before-tax total. If the full budget is $12{,}000$, then the before-tax desk total is
$$\frac{12{,}000}{1.06}$$

steps.title: Divide among the employees
steps.content:
There are $72$ desks, so the before-tax price per desk is
$$\frac{12{,}000}{1.06\cdot72}$$
Rounded to cents, this is
$$157.23$$
The closest listed price is $157.23$. The answer is B.
